Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Champion of the Century Daggers

When attacking, has a 12-13% chance of dealing 100-120% damage in 5 seconds.
Once in a while, removes 2 random buffs from the target of the attack and tears its armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 83200 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Also, that enemy takes 96000 physical damage over 4 sec.
Whenever the target of the dagger owner's attack dies, it cannot be resurrected for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
